title: Thelypteris gymnosora
taxonomy: Thelypteris gymnosora is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae. This species belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns. The family Thelypteridaceae is part of the order Blechnales, which includes various species of ferns. The classification of Thelypteris gymnosora reflects its evolutionary relationships with other ferns.

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems.
